message:
Use app token for private repo access in sync workflow

Move token generation to the start of the job and use it for both
validation and cloning, enabling sync from private repositories like
platform-internal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,12 +40,20 @@ jobs:
       DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK }}
       DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK }}
     steps:
+      - name: Generate app token
+        id: app-token
+        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
+        with:
+          app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
+          private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
+          owner: tenzir
+
       - name: Checkout repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Validate project name
         env:
-          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
         run: |
           if ! gh api "repos/tenzir/${{ inputs.project }}" --silent; then
             echo "::error::Repository tenzir/${{ inputs.project }} does not exist"
@@ -54,9 +62,11 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Clone source repository
         id: clone
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
         run: |
           git clone --depth 1 \
-            https://github.com/tenzir/${{ inputs.project }}.git \
+            https://x-access-token:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/tenzir/${{ inputs.project }}.git \
             /tmp/source
           echo "sha=$(git -C /tmp/source rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
@@ -133,13 +143,6 @@ jobs:
       - name: Stage changes
         run: git add .
 
-      - name: Generate app token
-        id: app-token
-        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
-        with:
-          app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
-          private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
-
       - name: Commit changes
         uses: planetscale/ghcommit-action@v0.2.0
         with:
